title: Khel
subTitle: Three fraudsters trick a rich elderly woman, Sulakshana, who is desperately looking for her long-lost grandchild, in order to acquire her estate and property.

title: Keemat
subTitle: After two thugs accidentally kill a man, they hide the truth from his family and try to save his village from the torments of an evil landlord in order to redeem themselves.

title: Wafadaar
subTitle: Chanda's parents disapprove of her boyfriend Ranga and want her to marry Prasad. Ranga is accused of having an affair with Sita.

title: Baadshah
subTitle: An amateur detective, Raj, goes by the nickname of Baadshah. But this name soon causes a misunderstanding that lands him in the middle of a conspiracy to assassinate the chief minister of Goa.

title: Lal Baadshah
subTitle: Lal Singh, a righteous and helpful man, clashes against Dayal Singh, a powerful personality. However, things get complicated when a hidden treasure is involved and Lal's tragic past is disclosed.

title: Mr. India
subTitle: Hoping to make the world a better place for orphaned children, a compassionate street musician takes on a power-hungry crime boss with the help of a cloaking device.

title: Coolie
subTitle: Zafar's obsessive love for Salma leads to her separation from her son, Iqbal. Twenty years later, Iqbal strives to reunite with his mother.

title: Josh
subTitle: Set in Vasco, Goa, Max and Prakash are young men who lead two rival groups. Their feud becomes worse when Prakash's brother, Rahul, falls in love with Shirley, Max's twin sister.

title: Josh
subTitle: Set in Vasco, Goa, Max and Prakash are young men who lead two rival groups. Their feud becomes worse when Prakash's brother, Rahul, falls in love with Shirley, Max's twin sister.

title: Bombay Boys
subTitle: Three Indian men raised in the West meet in Mumbai to fulfil separate goals. Krishna tries to make it big in Bollywood, Ricardo searches for his long-lost brother and Xerxes rediscovers his roots.

title: Falak
subTitle: Fueled by a deep desire for revenge, two young boys mature into strong-minded adults and set out to secure the justice denied to their father years ago.

title: Karishma Kudrat Ka
subTitle: Vijay lives in a village with his family. He makes an enemy with Lala and a bandit, Bhagad, who devises a plan to throw the former out of the village.

title: Sultanat
subTitle: Sultan, a brave warrior, tries to win the affections of Yasmin, a beautiful woman. However, his life turns upside down when his father is killed by a general, whom he swears revenge against.

title: Prithvi
subTitle: When Prithvi and Neha, a newly-wed couple, travel abroad for their honeymoon, Neha goes missing. Later, he fights against all odds to rescue her.

title: Bulandi
subTitle: Dharamraj Thakur, the head of a village, is highly respected by the villagers, However, his dignity is at stake when his younger brother, Arjun, is accused of raping a school teacher.

title: Roop Ki Rani Choron Ka Raja
subTitle: Three friends, orphaned by an evil man, set out to take revenge for their father's murders. They are forced to navigate a complex web of deceit and stolen identities before they can reach their goal.

title: Mr. Natwarlal
subTitle: When Natwar's elder brother is framed for bribery, he decides to avenge his brother's humiliation and thus poses as a crime lord.

title: Mr. Natwarlal
subTitle: When Natwar's elder brother is framed for bribery, he decides to avenge his brother's humiliation and thus poses as a crime lord.

subTitle: Bringing the best in television.
